other_observers: I found the dove and Brenda Wright took several photos. No one else saw the bird.; We have a lot of Eurasian Collared-Doves. I first heard the dove calling and knew it was not a Collared-Dove and so went out to see what it was. I called to Brenda to bring her camera as soon as I realized it was an Inca Dove.
specific_location: Dove was in our yard at 233 E 5th Ave in Nucla.
description: Small dove with scaly pattern covering the body with a long tail. When the dove flew the wings were rufous and the outer tail feathers were white.Behaviors: The dove was checking out our feeders. When the dove would fly it it wings gave off a rattling sound.Call: Repeated two note call several times on several occasions at different locations while in our yard.Plumage: adult
